cot_prefix: Okay, let's find out which of the choices is correct. First, I'll read the passage and then go through each option one by one to check which one is true. The passage says Yves Gomes is a university student in Maryland and is fighting deportation to India. He was born in the US, as he says he was brought to India when he was 14 months old. That means he was born in the US, which makes him one of the undocumented immigrants brought to the US before 16. He left the US when he was 14 months old, but he grew up in the US until then? Or did he go to India when he was 14 months old? Wait, the passage says he left India with his parents when he was 14 months old. Wait, maybe I misread. Let me check again.
